Admin.description: Manage credentials, usage, debug traces, and runtime settings in one place.
Admin.topbarHint: Language is stored in a cookie, so stable routes do not need locale prefixes.

dashboard.title: Quickly confirm proxy health and credential pool availability.

usage.title: Inspect request volume, token load, and model mix trends.

credentials.title: Manage CodeBuddy credentials, access keys, and OAuth refresh flows.

apiTest.title: Run targeted requests through the current `/v1` proxy path.

debug.title: Review sanitized upstream request and response traces.

settings.title: Adjust environment-facing settings directly from the console.

authHooks.loginDescription: Use the built-in admin login to establish the session cookie, then manage credentials, access keys, and passkeys from the console.

settingsPanel.helper: The passkey RP ID should usually match the final site domain. HTTPS works directly; localhost is commonly allowed for local development, while other non-HTTPS domains usually cannot use passkeys.
settingsPanel.title: Service settings

securityPanel.title: Console security
securityPanel.disabled: Authentication is disabled; the console is publicly accessible.
securityPanel.confirmDisable: Disabling authentication will remove the admin password and all passkeys. Continue?
securityPanel.passkeyOptionsFailed: Unable to create a passkey registration request.
securityPanel.passkeyUnavailable: Passkeys require HTTPS or a localhost origin.

loginPage.autofillAvailable: Passkey autofill is available and the page will try it automatically.
loginPage.autofillUnavailable: Passkeys are configured, but this browser does not support conditional autofill. Use the passkey button instead.
loginPage.createPasswordStatus: Create the first admin password to unlock the console.
loginPage.description: Sign in with the admin password or a passkey.
loginPage.descriptionLogin: Use the existing admin password or a registered passkey. When the browser supports conditional passkeys, the page will try it automatically.
loginPage.descriptionSetup: Create the first admin password. The backend will set the admin session cookie immediately after setup succeeds.
loginPage.errorPasskeyFailed: Passkey sign-in failed. Try again or use your password.
loginPage.errorPasskeyUnavailable: Passkey sign-in is unavailable right now.
loginPage.errorPasswordStatus: Use your admin password to continue.
loginPage.headingLogin: Sign in to the admin console
loginPage.noPasskeysConfigured: No passkeys are configured for this admin account yet.
loginPage.passkeyHintLogin: after the first account is configured.
loginPage.passwordSignInHint: Use your password or a saved passkey to continue.
loginPage.title: Admin sign in

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.firstMessageRoleToSystem: Treat the first message role as system

console.authCheckMissing: Missing auth state; cannot continue polling.
console.authLinkMissing: The authorization link has not been created yet.
console.authSaved: Authentication succeeded and the credential was saved.
console.authStarted: Complete sign-in and the console will keep polling.
console.clipboardUnsupported: Clipboard is not available in this environment.
console.requestIdle: Click "Send test" to view the API response...
